candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.why: FX movement, not cash balance.

Cash interest payment, unrelated.

variables.notes: Exact reported cash balance on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Debt component within current liabilities, not the total.
Cash flow change, not balance-sheet stock.
Balancing item, not preferred when a reported total exists.
Balancing line for a component, not total current liabilities.
Noncurrent liabilities, wrong target.
Best reported total for current/short-term liabilities on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the clear total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best semantic fit for current debt; one duplicate row appears to include leases and another appears to exclude leases based on matching with the separate 'Lease liability' row.
Debt-related but appears blank and not explicitly current.
Debt-related but appears blank and not explicitly current.
Explicit lease liability, which should be excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: There are two identical 'Interest-bearing current liabilities' rows. The lower-valued one appears to exclude leases because the difference versus the higher row matches 'Lease liability' in several years. Final choice uses the exact label, but duplicate identical labels create ambiguity in extraction.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet label for current tax liability / taxes payable.
Deferred tax is noncurrent tax accounting, not taxes payable/current tax liability.

variables.notes: Confident choice outside the shortlist; 'Current Tax' is the best match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Semantically close to net PPE, but appears as a balancing line and lacks reported values here.
Best reported balance-sheet line for tangible/material assets, which corresponds to property, plant and equipment under IFRS-style presentation.
Exact gross PPE concept, but no visible values in preview and less preferable than a clean reported total/net line when available.
Cash flow capex, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist; 'Material assets' is the reported tangible asset/PPE line and is preferable to balancing lines.
